nl_query: Which evaluators are currently in the pool for active boards but have no active script assignments, and show their faculty name, department, and the boards they are eligible for.
failed_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT ep.employee_id, fc.name AS faculty_name, au.academic_unit, b.name AS board_name
FROM   evaluator_pool ep
JOIN   faculty_cache  fc ON fc.employee_id = ep.employee_id
JOIN   app_user      au ON au.employee_id = ep.employee_id
JOIN   board          b ON b.id = ep.board_id
WHERE  ep.eligible_role = 'PRIMARY' AND ep.is_available = TRUE
  AND  ep.board_id IN (
    SELECT board_id FROM evaluator_pool WHERE eligible_role = 'PRIMARY' AND is_available = TRUE
  )
  AND  ep.employee_id NOT IN (
    SELECT evaluator_id FROM script_assignment WHERE is_active = TRUE
  )
GROUP  BY ep.employee_id, fc.name, au.academic_unit, b.name
ORDER  BY faculty_name, academic_unit, board_name
error: Validation failed (schema): Hallucinated column(s): app_user.academic_unit, board.name, app_user.academic_unit, board.name, unaliased.academic_unit. Use only columns that exist in the schema.
